A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy. The starship was lost on an unknown planet where scientists have been working for centuries without realizing it had dropped off by Earth's surface or made contact with its host system at some point before their return mission ever started. A single human station left behind during that time is described here (in detail): http://www.....theresideofthissite.net/index....3f12b9e7c8a1de0d75ad6ed4be5395718
